User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Euskal Sustatzailea app.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

lastLogin.description: Timestamp of the user's last login.

missionDifficulty.description: Difficulty level of the current mission (e.g., 'low', 'medium', 'high').

rescueReward.description: Reward for completing the rescue mission (e.g., 'streak_shield').

LearningItem.title: LearningItem
LearningItem.description: Represents a learning item or exercise within the application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LearningItem entity.

englishText.description: The English text of the learning item.

basqueText.description: The Basque translation of the learning item.

difficulty.description: Difficulty level of the learning item (e.g., 'easy', 'medium', 'hard').

UserLearningItem.title: UserLearningItem
UserLearningItem.description: Represents the relationship between a user and a learning item, tracking progress and SRS data.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserLearningItem entity.

lastReviewed.description: Timestamp of the last time the user reviewed this learning item.

nextReview.description: Timestamp for the next scheduled review of this learning item.

correctCount.description: Number of times the user answered correctly for this item.

incorrectCount.description: Number of times the user answered incorrectly for this item.

definition.description: Stores user profiles. Only the authenticated user can read/write their data.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Stores all learning items available in the application.

params.name: learningItemId
params.description: The unique identifier of the learning item.

definition.description: Stores user-specific learning item data. Only the user can access their own data.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: userLearningItemId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user learning item.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to support the Euskal Sustatzailea application, focusing on user data, learning items, and the relationships between them. Key considerations include authorization independence, clarity, and scalability.

1.  **Users Collection (`/users/{userId}`):** Stores user profiles. This collection utilizes path-based ownership. Only the authenticated user (`request.auth.uid`) can read/write their document.

2.  **Learning Items Collection (`/learning_items/{learningItemId}`):** Stores learning items. All items share the same security posture, simplifying rules.

3.  **User Learning Items Collection (`/users/{userId}/user_learning_items/{userLearningItemId}`):** This subcollection represents the relationship between users and learning items. It uses path-based ownership: only the user (`request.auth.uid`) matching `{userId}` can access data within their path.

This structure enables simple, robust security rules that are easy to debug. The design promotes authorization independence via path-based ownership. The segregation of public learning items from private user data simplifies security rules and supports secure `list` operations (QAPs).
